text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a number of victories under her belt, Mejiro
McQueen and I decide to go out for some tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems she's made a decision.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...That's it. I have made up my mind.
choice_data_list:
So you're going to get the Mont Blanc set after
all?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm not talking about the menu!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Do you recall how I won those hot spring coupons
in that shopping raffle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I decided how I'd like to use them, since I have
been so successful up to this point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I think the two people who have made the biggest
contributions to my success ought to be the ones
to go. Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask her who they might be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It was a close call, but in my opinion...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's the two of us. A reasonable conclusion, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As my trainer, you have both the right and the
obligation to accompany me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You'd "love to"?! How direct you are!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, that pleases me. It's settled, then. We
should begin making preparations soon.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (I did it... I finally had the courage to ask!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, we reach the hot spring inn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Um... That was quite a wonderful bath. Did you
enjoy yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
B-before we go eat, there's something I'd like to
talk to you about. Um, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's said that this hot spring is good for joint pain,
bruises, and cold sensitivity, among other things.
It also helps promote beautiful skin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Long ago in the Edo period, this place flourished
as an inn town, and many travelers stopped to
rest here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Its specialties are hot spring manju and sweetfish.
In other words, what I want to talk about...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is not this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-although I'm glad I came, I don't know how I
should spend my time here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Take it easy?! Under these circumstances?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I admire your calm state of mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm no good, am I? I embarked from the Mejiro family home and devoted myself to running, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
One step away from all of that and I have no clue
what to do with myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's childish, isn't it? But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I think the fact that I can tell when I'm being
childish means that I've grown too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You... think so as well, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Maybe it's the blood rushing to my head, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I can be completely honest with
you for the first time, now that I've come here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're with me, but not as my trainer. Here, we
don't need to train.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, it's nice to meet you, my not-trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have relaxed a little. The light
returns to her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's have our meal. I shall take my
time savoring these scrumptious-looking dishes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, there are many things I want to talk
about! You'll spend time with me, of course, won't
you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have lots of fun and lots of laughs.
We talk animatedly about nothing in particular
for hours.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Mejiro McQueen and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
